description: Style NoteGift set of Wallet and HandkerchiefWondering what to give that special someone as a gift? Your search is over with this classy combination!Sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside your jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out.Comes with a handkerchiefProduct DetailsBlack leather two-fold wallet with a flap in the centreHas two main compartments, five card slots, two insert pockets, one zippered pocket and two id card holder slotsWhite cotton kerchief with coloured stripes at the edges (stripe colour may differ from that in photograph)Material and CareLeatherWipe wallet with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlightSizeWallet dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHandkerchief dimensions: 42 cm x 42 cm
